info.name: P4U Complete User + Vendor API Collection
info.description: Complete user and vendor Postman collection generated from user-web/vendor-web API clients and gateway routes. Base URL: https://api.planext4u.com. Protected routes use Bearer {{accessToken}}. OTP exchange requires Firebase phone auth ID token. Multipart uploads use form-data key file.

Current socio route: GET /api/v1/social/notifications/me. Returns social activity notifications, separate from persisted /api/v1/notifications/me.
Current socio route: GET /api/v1/social/users/me/settings.
Current socio route: PATCH /api/v1/social/users/me/settings. Body is partial settings object.
Current socio route: POST /api/v1/social/stories/:storyId/like.
Multipart form-data. Use repeated field name `files`; backend accepts up to 8 files.
Current socio upload route: DELETE /api/v1/social/media/:id. Owner-only delete.
Public media read route mounted at /socio-uploads/media/:id. Response is binary image/video, not JSON.

response.name: Example response
response.body: "Binary media stream. Supports Range header for videos."

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Mobile Cover",
  "categoryId": "{{categoryId}}",
  "sellPrice": "199.00",
  "discountAmount": "0.00",
  "finalPrice": "199.00",
  "taxConfigurationId": "tax-id",
  "shortDescription": "Premium cover",
  "longDescription": "Premium mobile cover",
  "thumbnailUrl": "/vendor-uploads/product.jpg",
  "bannerUrls": [
    "/vendor-uploads/banner.jpg"
  ],
  "availability": true,
  "isActive": true,
  "metadata": {
    "brand": "P4U"
  }
}

  "serviceId": "{{serviceId}}",
  "price": "500.00",
  "isActive": true,

  "displayName": "Custom Software Development",
  "description": "Web/app development",
  "iconUrl": "/vendor-uploads/service.png",
  "trending": true,
  "emergency": false,
  "basePrice": "500.00",
  "priceType": "fixed",
  "duration": "1 hour",
  "city": "Chennai"
}
